subject: A massive wild boar charging through undergrowth, scattering armored hunters
description: An enormous boar — easily several times the size of a human — charges forward through a forest clearing, dust and debris kicked up around its hooves. Its bristled fur is thick and reddish-brown, tusks visible at the sides of its snarling mouth. Two armored humanoid hunters are visible at the edges of the frame, clearly being scattered by the creature's charge — one tumbling on the left, one partially visible on the right. The background is warm green forest. The boar's eyes have a reddish gleam.
foreground: Giant charging boar; scattered hunters at the frame edges
emotion: primal terror — boar dominates the frame, hunters reduced to peripheral chaos
